roles.title: Software Tester
description: System Analysis & Design: Analyzed requirements and designed system architecture.
Project Management: Managed timelines and coordinated with teams.
QA & Testing: Designed Test Cases and performed Manual/Functional testing.
Infrastructure: Managed Server and Database stability.
Issue Tracking: Handled bug tracking and Root Cause Analysis.

roles.title: Computer Teacher
description: Teaching Management: Responsible for teaching Computer Science and Technology subjects, imparting theoretical and practical knowledge to vocational students.
Curriculum Preparation: Planning lessons aligned with current technology to develop digital skills for learners.
Measurement and Evaluation: Monitoring student progress through various computer activities and projects.

roles.title: Software Quality Assurance Engineer
description: Quality assurance and testing for enterprise software solutions.

portfolio.title: Suchada 2019 TMS
portfolio.description: ShipManager - A comprehensive logistics and transport management system for Suchada 2019 Partnership. Highlights include AI-powered OCR for smart document processing, LINE Bot integration for seamless data entry, specialized transport cost calculations (standard & weight-based), and automated Excel reporting.

features.title: Core Modules
items: Transport Logging - Manage standard and 'cow distribution' shipments
Expense Tracking - Track driver expenses and withdrawals
Fuel Logging - Record refueling and calculate costs
Driver Management - Driver profiles and income
Vehicle Management - Vehicle registration and data
OCR System - AI-powered data extraction from slips/receipts (Shipping, Fuel, Expense)

features.title: Key Features
items: AI Powered OCR: Auto-extract data from transfer slips (Expense), fuel receipts (Fuel), shipping documents (Shipping)
LINE Bot Integration: Upload slips via LINE, auto-save to Drive and Database
Dual Transport Types: Standard and Weight-based distribution (Cow Distribution)
Excel Export: Formatted export with borders and styling
